home.title: Hello Stay
home.sub: Premium Private Villas in Yancheng, Kaohsiung
home.hellohouse_desc: Flexible private rental for 6–26 guests. Luxurious island kitchen, mahjong table, and diverse room types. A perfect blend of heritage charm and modern comfort.
home.hellohouse_location: Near Pier-2 Art Center · 10 min walk
home.godin_desc: Boutique standalone for 10–12 guests. Five-story private space with a cozy, home-like atmosphere. Best value for small groups.
home.dazhi_desc: Brand new elevator building, up to 48 guests. Next to Dagang Bridge and Pier-2 Dayi Warehouses. Three rooms per floor, book by floor or entire building.
home.cta_sub: Flexible hosting for 6 to 48 guests, tailored for every gathering.
home.meta_title: Kaohsiung Private Villa Rental | Hello Stay | 6-48 Guests
home.meta_desc: Hello Stay offers three premium private villas in Kaohsiung's Yancheng district: Hello House (6-26 guests), Godin House (10-12 guests), and Dazhi (up to 48). Island kitchen, mahjong, near Pier-2. Google 4.9 stars.

hellohouse.title: Hello House
hellohouse.about_title: A Warm Space in the Heart of Kaohsiung
hellohouse.about_desc: Located in the heart of Yancheng, Kaohsiung, Hello House is your perfect base for exploring the harbor city. We specialize in private rental spaces for 6 to 26 guests. No strangers—just you and your loved ones enjoying the spacious island kitchen, sharing laughter in the living room.
hellohouse.feat1_desc: Open-plan space with IH stove, microwave, and full tableware. Perfect for group dining and hot pot parties.
hellohouse.feat2_desc: Mahjong table and 43-inch smart TV to keep the party going.
hellohouse.feat3_desc: From double to six-person rooms with flexible configurations. All rooms feature separate wet/dry bathrooms and Instagram-worthy hanging chairs.
hellohouse.rooms_sub: All 6 rooms feature pocket spring mattresses, separate wet/dry bathrooms, smart TV, and climate control
hellohouse.cta_bottom_sub: Whether it's a family reunion or a friends' party, we're ready for you.
hellohouse.meta_title: Hello House | Kaohsiung Private Villa | 6-26 Guests near Pier-2
hellohouse.meta_desc: Premium private villa in Kaohsiung's Yancheng district. Hello House offers flexible rental for 6-26 guests with luxury island kitchen, mahjong, and diverse room types. Walking distance to Pier-2 Art Center.

godin.title: Godin House
godin.hero_desc: Nestled in a quiet Yancheng alley, this five-story standalone building offers a warm private rental experience for 10 to 12 guests.
godin.about_desc: Godin House is the refined second property in the Hello Stay family. Enjoy the entire five-story building privately with no other guests. Designed in a cozy family style, every stay feels like coming home. Starting from NT$10,000 on weekdays—the best value for small group rentals.
godin.rooms_sub: Five-story standalone with 4 rooms, all with private bathrooms and climate control
godin.meta_title: Godin House | Kaohsiung Boutique Private Villa | 10-12 Guests
godin.meta_desc: Boutique five-story private villa in Kaohsiung's Yancheng district. Godin House accommodates 10-12 guests with cozy family style. From NT$10,000/night. Near Pier-2.

traffic.label: Getting Here
traffic.title: Directions & Parking
traffic.step1_desc: Take the HSR to Zuoying Station
traffic.step2_desc: Board at Zuoying, exit at Formosa Boulevard
traffic.step3_desc: Transfer to the Orange Line at Formosa Boulevard, one stop to Yanchengpu (O2)
traffic.step4_desc: Take Exit 4, walk about 5 minutes to reach us
traffic.driving_tip: 🚗 For driving, search "Hello House Kaohsiung" in your GPS
traffic.meta_title: Directions & Parking | Hello House & Godin House
traffic.meta_desc: Complete directions to Hello House and Godin House in Kaohsiung. Driving, parking, MRT routes from Zuoying HSR Station. Walk 5 minutes from Yanchengpu Station (O2).

book.meta_title: Check Availability & Pricing | Hello Stay Kaohsiung
book.meta_desc: Instantly check availability and pricing for Kaohsiung private villa rentals. Select your dates and group size for automatic pricing.
